channel.title: Salzburg Budget on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Salzburg Budget on Share Hub

item.title: Salzburg Travel Guide | Mozart's City 1.5 Hours from Munich (2025)
item.description: Salzburg is a 1.5-hour train journey from Munich — Mozart’s birthplace and the city where Sound of Music was filmed. Deutschlandticket takes you to the border free — a few euros more and you’re in Austria.
